LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT 195 WILLOW STREET INVESTMENTS, LLC, 818 VAN NESS, LLC, AND, 81-816-826 VAN NESS LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS WERE NOT REQUIRED TO FILE A PRELIMINARY TWENTY DAY NOTICE UNDER CC SECTION 3097(B). PLAINTIFFS ARE NOT ENTITLED TO THE EXTRA PROTECTIONS AFFORDED TO ORIGINAL CONTRACTORS AND CLAIMANTS DESCRIBED IN CC SECTION 3259.5(A). PLAINTIFFS ARE SUBJECT TO THE THIRTY DAY DEADLINE SET FORTH IN CC SECTION 3116 WITH WHICH THEY FAILED TO COMPLY. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT THE DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 195 WILLOW STREET INVESTMENTS, LLC, 818 VAN NESS, LLC, and, 81-816-826 VAN NESS LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Kerry K. Fennelly, Esq. of Melissa W. Cook & Assoc. (619) 280-4302, Appearing thru CourtCall, for Plaintiffs and opposing party; David R. Sidran, Esq. of Toschi, Sidran, Collins, Doyle (510) 835-3400, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs were not required to file a preliminary twenty day notice under CC section 3097(b). Plaintiffs are not entitled to the extra protections afforded to original contractors and claimants described in CC section 3259.5(a). Plaintiffs are subject to the thirty day deadline set forth in CC section 3116 with which they failed to comply. No reasonable probability that the defect can be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Continued To Jun-11-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS 195 WILLOW STREET INVESTMENTS, LLC, 818 VAN NESS, LLC, and, 81-816-826 VAN NESS LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: David R. Sidran, Esq. of Toschi, Sidran, Collins, Doyle (510) 835-3400, appearing for Defendants and moving party; Kerry K. Fennelly, Esq., of Melissa W. Cook & Associates, appearing for Plaintiff, California Iron Workers. Ruling: Argued and the matter is continued to June 11, 2009 for further hearing. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
